🍽️ Aprati Foods Favicon Test

✅ Favicon Successfully Configured!

Your favicon should now be visible in the browser tab. If you can see the Aprati Foods favicon above, then the configuration is working correctly.

📁 Available Favicon Files

web.ico
Main favicon
Companylogo.ico
Company logo favicon
logo-white.png
PNG logo (white)

🔧 Configuration Details

  • Primary Favicon: /images/web.ico
  • Apple Touch Icon: /images/web.ico (180x180)
  • Shortcut Icon: /images/Companylogo.ico
  • Type: image/x-icon
  • Sizes: 16x16, 32x32, 180x180

🚀 Next Steps

Your favicon is now configured and should work across all modern browsers. You can:

  • Refresh your browser to see the favicon
  • Clear browser cache if favicon doesn't appear
  • Test on different browsers and devices
  • Consider creating additional favicon sizes for better compatibility
